blockers.title: Firebase Admin SDK private key committed to git
blockers.description: service-account.json was Added (status A) in commit 42fde63 (2025-11-27). File is in current HEAD and has been pushed to github.com/ynotfins/nfa-alert. File size: 2392 bytes (consistent with real private key). File IS in .gitignore but was committed before the gitignore rule was effective.
remediation: 1. Rotate key NOW in Firebase Console > Project Settings > Service Accounts > Generate New Private Key > delete old key
2. Remove from git history: git filter-repo --invert-paths --path service-account.json
3. Force-push: git push origin main --force (coordinate with team)
4. Update firebase-admin.ts to load from GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON env var only
5. Store new key as base64 JSON string in .env (gitignored)

blockers.title: ~3% test coverage — only webhook parser tested
blockers.description: 40 tests cover only webhook parser. incidents.ts (799 LOC), chat.ts, auth-context.tsx, all components are untested.
remediation: Add integration tests for incidents service using Firebase emulator

resolved.title: No rate limiting on /api/webhook and /api/notifications/send
resolved.resolution: src/proxy.ts created with sliding window rate limiter: /api/webhook (10 req/min), /api/notifications/send (20 req/min). Uses x-forwarded-for for IP resolution. No new dependencies.
